items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Cloud Infrastructure Architect to design the next generation of our cloud platform. You will define the architectural patterns, reference designs, and migration strategies that enable our platform to scale globally while maintaining security, reliability, and cost efficiency.

This is a senior technical leadership role where you will influence decisions across the entire engineering organization. You will work with teams at every level to ensure our infrastructure supports both current needs and future growth.

Responsibilities

  • Design multi-region, multi-tenant cloud architectures on AWS
  • Define reference architectures, standards, and best practices for cloud-native development
  • Lead the design of disaster recovery, high availability, and failover strategies
  • Evaluate and introduce new cloud services and technologies
  • Mentor engineering teams on cloud architecture patterns and cost optimization
  • Partner with Security to ensure infrastructure meets compliance requirements (SOC 2, GDPR)

Requirements

  • 10+ years of infrastructure or cloud engineering experience
  • Deep expertise with AWS services (VPC, EKS, RDS, Lambda, CloudFront, IAM)
  • Experience designing multi-tenant SaaS architectures at scale
  • Strong understanding of networking, security, and cost management in the cloud
  • AWS Solutions Architect Professional certification or equivalent knowledge

Nice to Have

  • Experience with multi-cloud or hybrid cloud architectures
  • Knowledge of edge computing and CDN architectures
  • Experience with FinOps frameworks and cloud cost governance
